_readme: GLM52-NS north-star design assumption block ASM-1970..1989 — EMITTED by the Fable ARCHITECTURE-DESIGN agent designer-4 (2026-07-12) for central registration by the coordinator with the commit; registry/assumptions.jsonl is NOT touched by this pass (no git actions, design-role constraint).
Range verified free at emission: max registered id in registry/assumptions.jsonl is ASM-1967; repo-wide grep for ASM-19[7-9][0-9] empty.

Companion design: docs/next/design/glm52-kernel-integration-northstar.md. Tags follow the registry convention: MEASURED | LIT-BACKED | DERIVED | STIPULATED | EXTRAPOLATION. LIT-BACKED rows below that were obtained via a summarising web fetch say so explicitly and name their P0 re-verification path; they must not be cited as source-verified until P0.1 lands.

assumptions.claim: NORTH-STAR FRAMING: colibri (github.com/JustVugg/colibri, Apache-2.0 single-file C engine running GLM-5.2 from ~25GB RAM + ~370GB NVMe) is adopted as the reference integration substrate for thesis (B) (inference-compute reduction) because it exposes the internals no API exposes (expert routing, cache/pin, draft injection, KV); thesis (A) (intelligence/grounding) is host-agnostic and enters this substrate only for colibri's determinism/pinning properties. GLM52-NS is a roof the current tracks build toward; it blocks nothing and is blocked by almost nothing at probe stage.
assumptions.rationale: Separating which thesis actually needs the local engine prevents spending colibri's brutal throughput (0.05-1 tok/s) on experiments an API serves better.

assumptions.claim: COLIBRI FACT INVENTORY, fetch-grade: single C file c/glm.c (~2,400 lines) + headers, zero runtime deps, no plugin architecture (customisation = editing glm.c / the FP8->int4 converter under c/tools/ / c/openai_server.py); ~17B dense params resident (~8.7-9.9GB int4, sources disagree), routed experts streamed int4 from disk (~370GB, ~19MB/expert) with per-layer LRU cache + pinned hot set loadable from a stats file (PIN=) + AUTOPIN learning cache (.coli_usage) + OS page cache L2; sigmoid router + per-expert bias, greedy top-k, TOPK/TOPP env overrides; PILOT=1 router-lookahead prefetch (next-layer routing 71.6% predictable from current-layer post-attention state; measured NEUTRAL on saturated disk); MLA KV 576 floats/token/layer (57x); MTP head int8-mandatory, 39-59% acceptance, 2.2-2.8 tok/forward; grammar-forced GBNF drafts injected as pre-accepted spans (~1.0 acceptance, adaptive disable <50%); cold decode ~11GB expert reads/token, ~0.05-0.1 tok/s on ~1GB/s NVMe, community 0.28-1.83 tok/s; requires x86 AVX2 + OpenMP, >=16GB RAM (25GB rec.), ~370GB LOCAL NVMe. PROVENANCE CAVEAT: obtained 2026-07-12 via summarising WebFetch of the README and raw glm.c — paraphrase risk; two internal discrepancies flagged (21,504 routed experts vs 75 MoE layers x 256 = 19,200; top-k 6 vs 8). Every row is re-verified mechanically from the checkout + model config.json at probe P0.1 before anything load-bearing rests on it.
assumptions.rationale: The design's arithmetic and seam map rest on these engine facts; house honesty requires recording that they are fetch-grade, not checkout-verified, and naming the mechanical upgrade path.

assumptions.claim: GLM-5.2 ARCHITECTURE, fetch-grade: 744B-total-parameter DeepSeek-V3-style MoE by Z.ai (weights MIT); ~40B active/token; 78 transformer layers (first 3 dense FFN, remainder MoE); 256 routed experts/MoE-layer with ~8 active + 1 shared expert (colibri glm.c summary said topk~6, n_shared~2 — config.json at P0 resolves); embedding dim 6,144; vocab ~155k; MLA + DSA sparse attention; 1M-token context; native single MTP layer for EAGLE-style speculative decoding. Sources: Z.ai/community coverage via web search 2026-07-12 (orbital.net.in, lucaberton.com, NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel GLM-5 MoE-DSA page, SGLang GLM-5.2 cookbook, together.ai model page) — none verified beyond search-result level; treated as background, with colibri's config.json as the authoritative pin at P0.
assumptions.rationale: Seam arithmetic (11.4GB/token, expert-count bands) needs the MoE geometry; the design deliberately keeps exact values non-load-bearing until read from the checkpoint config.

assumptions.claim: SEAM TAXONOMY, fixed for this track: B1a concept-conditioned expert CACHING/PINNING/prefetch (quality-safe); B1b concept-guided expert-DROP = dimension collapse on the expert axis (function-changing); B2 deterministic engine as speculative DRAFTER through colibri's existing draft/grammar injection path; B3 concept-vector KV compression/augmentation; A1 engine as grounding/verification/constrained-decoding layer at the OpenAI-gateway seam. B1a/B1b/B2/B3 serve thesis (B); A1 serves thesis (A); B2 and A1 share the engine-output plumbing.
assumptions.rationale: A fixed seam vocabulary keeps later preregs, gates, and verdicts addressable and prevents scope drift between quality-safe and function-changing interventions.

assumptions.claim: DISK-BOUND ARITHMETIC (over ASM-1971/1972 premises): cold expert I/O ~= L_moe x k x 19MB ~= 75 x 8 x 19MB ~= 11.4GB/token (matches README ~11GB); disk-bound throughput tok/s <= bandwidth / (miss_rate x 11.4GB), hence INVERSE-LINEAR in expert bytes actually read — halve misses (better pinning) or halve loads (fewer experts) => ~2x tok/s until the CPU-matmul wall. PREFETCH DOES NOT REDUCE BYTES READ, only overlaps I/O with compute; with I/O >> compute the overlap ceiling is the compute fraction, which is why colibri measures PILOT neutral on saturated disks. Therefore on small boxes the levers are (i) WHAT SITS IN RAM (pin/cache selection), (ii) HOW MANY experts are loaded (top-k/top-p/drop), (iii) draft amortisation (union-of-experts per verified batch); prefetch recall matters only on balanced hardware. RAM bands: 32GB box => ~15-18GB cache ~= 800-950 experts ~= 4-5% of ~20k; 64GB => ~2,300-2,600 ~= 12%.
assumptions.rationale: Corrects the task brief's raise-prefetch-recall emphasis honestly and identifies which interventions can move throughput on the probe hardware; all arithmetic, no new empirical claim.

assumptions.claim: SEAM RANKING by tractability x impact x testability, and FIRST TARGET: (1) B1a — zero-to-tiny C changes (PIN= interface exists), attacks the measured bottleneck, quality-preserving, mechanical admission gate from trace replay; (2) B1b — larger win (footprint + linear I/O) but function-changing, enters only after B1a's admission gate; (3) A1 — buildable now at the gateway, thesis value gated on kernel coverage + blocking pilots; (4) B2 — injection path exists (grammar drafts) but impact ~0 at current engine coverage; (5) B3 — deferred (ASM-1981). FIRST TARGET = B1a entered through measurement-only probe P0, because its decisive question (does concept-conditioned routing structure exist in GLM-5.2?) is answerable for ~$20-50 with no C modification, no quality eval, and a mechanical yes/no whose negative also kills B1b cheaply.
assumptions.rationale: Cheapest-decisive-question-first ordering; the P0 trace dataset is re-analysable indefinitely (delegate-and-reanalyse discipline) without re-spending on collection.

assumptions.claim: ADMISSION GATE G-B1 (pre-registered shape; exact threshold frozen in the P1 prereg): from P0 routing traces, offline oracle replay compares held-out-prompt cache hit rates at MATCHED RAM budget for: global-hot pin (AUTOPIN-analog), recency-LRU (colibri default), embedding-topic-cluster pin (kernel-free deflator), kernel-concept pin, and oracle per-prompt pin (upper bound). The B1 seam family is ADMITTED iff kernel-concept pinning beats BOTH the global-hot AND topic-cluster deflators by >=10% relative miss reduction at matched budget on held-out prompts; else B1a AND B1b are recorded dead-at-this-model and the track's residual value is A1 plumbing + B2 acceptance measurement. Analogous in role to DDC's ddc0 Stage-0 admission gate.
assumptions.rationale: DeepSeek-family load-balanced routers may be too flat to condition on; a ~$30 mechanical gate finds out before any prototype is paid for, and its FAIL branch is worded in advance.

assumptions.claim: DEFLATOR DISCIPLINE for every B1 claim: colibri's own AUTOPIN learning cache (pin-what-was-hot, zero kernel) and an embedding-topic-cluster prior (cluster prompts with any off-the-shelf embedding; per-cluster expert histograms; zero kernel — the knull-analog for this seam) are MANDATORY comparison arms at matched RAM budget. A kernel-specific sentence is licensed only if the kernel arm beats BOTH; a tie is reported with equal prominence as 'concept/topic conditioning helps; the kernel is one conditioner among several' — the f2b/DECONF content-not-structure wording, pre-adopted. The one mechanism a topic model cannot replicate — conditioning on entailed-but-unstated concepts from engine closure — is gated on engine/kernel coverage and is the only route to a structural kernel claim at this seam.
assumptions.rationale: Four prior kernel-specificity probes deflated to content-not-structure; this seam ships with its strongest deflator built into the reference engine, so the control structure must be fixed before any number exists.

assumptions.claim: QUALITY-SAFETY CLASSIFICATION: B1a pinning/prefetch interventions are quality-preserving BY CONSTRUCTION (they change what is cached, never what is computed; verified in P1 by DRAFT=0 byte-identical outputs), so their endpoints are pure systems numbers needing no ability-retention gate. B1b expert-drop and forced-mode B2 CHANGE the computed function and require DDC-style matched-compression/matched-load-count retention evaluation with their own prereg + blocking pilot before any run. No function-changing intervention may be reported under a quality-safe label.
assumptions.rationale: Keeps the cheap rung genuinely cheap (no eval burden) and makes silent quality degradation mechanically impossible to smuggle into a throughput claim.

assumptions.claim: POTENTIAL-SAVING BANDS, direction-only, resolution = P0.3 replay + P1 live A/B: if global-hot pinning achieves hit H_g=0.3 and concept-conditioned pinning at matched budget achieves H_c in {0.5, 0.6, 0.7}, disk-bound throughput multiplies by ~{1.4x, 1.75x, 2.3x} (bytes/token scales with 1-hit); B1b loading 4-of-8 experts halves I/O (~2x disk-bound tok/s) by arithmetic with quality entirely open; a concept-bounded deployment shard at retained fraction f=0.25 cuts the disk estate 370GB -> ~93GB if retention holds. None of these numbers is a premise anywhere; G-B1/G-P1/P2a gates resolve them.
assumptions.rationale: Registers the size of the prize honestly as projection, so planning can weigh the probe without any band leaking into a claim.

assumptions.claim: B2 ENGINE-AS-DRAFTER design: engine-derived spans (entailed answers, typed-slot fills, canonical renderings) enter through colibri's EXISTING draft/grammar injection machinery in two pre-distinguished modes — (i) LOSSLESS: drafts verified by the model's own distribution via rejection sampling; output distribution unchanged; acceptance rate is the measurable; a pure (B) accelerator; (ii) FORCED: engine-licensed spans forced as in grammar mode; output changes; classified as an (A) mechanism (constrained correct decoding) and never reported as a pure speedup. Value scales with (coverage of engine-derivable output spans) x (surface-form acceptance); at current engine coverage the expected end-to-end impact is ~0, so B2 is a P1 side-quest (measure acceptance on kinship/sense items), not a lead bet.
assumptions.rationale: The injection path is production-proven (grammar drafts ~1.0 acceptance), so the honest open variables are coverage and surface-form match, both named with their resolution paths.

assumptions.claim: B3 (concept-vector KV) is DEFERRED INDEFINITELY as a seam: MLA KV (576 floats/token/layer, RAM-resident) is not the measured bottleneck at any context colibri users run; substituting foreign vectors training-free breaks a function the attention was trained to read, and any learned adapter is a training intervention outside the training-free tier; and injecting kernel vectors into activations violates the programme's standing Law-1 interface-locality discipline as currently stated. Recorded as a research note whose mandatory deflators (kernel-free KV merging/eviction) are pre-named; re-opening it requires an explicit maintainer decision revisiting Law-1 plus a long-context workload where KV is demonstrably binding.
assumptions.rationale: Prevents the programme's one-concept-vector-carries-many-tokens thesis from being tested first at its least tractable, discipline-violating seam.

assumptions.claim: A1 GATEWAY design: all (A) integration lives at the OpenAI-gateway seam (c/openai_server.py or a proxy), zero C changes — (1) pre-generation engine-closure grounding (SCALE-GROUND A3/A4 arm shapes with GLM-5.2 as host); (2) post-generation claim checking with engine verdicts {CONSISTENT, ANOMALOUS, REFUSE} driving verify-retry or flagging (honesty-first alignment); (3) engine-emitted GBNF grammars for constrained decoding (simultaneously (A)-correctness and (B)-throughput). A1's colibri-specific asset is INSTRUMENT-GRADE DETERMINISM: pinned weights + DRAFT=0 byte-reproducible greedy decoding remove API-model drift from the instrument threat model, and GLM-5.2-as-host is the natural scale-artifact test of the verify-retry hypothesis (prior hosts possibly too small to cooperate). Every A1 thesis experiment requires the ASM-1830..1836 blocking pilot and inherits the ENGINE-INF divergence-seam discipline; A1 experiments not needing determinism should use the API, not colibri.
assumptions.rationale: Routes (A) around the programme's 0-for-5 runtime-interface failure zone by naming the pilot requirement up front, and captures the one genuinely new (A) asset (a deterministic frontier host) without overclaiming.

assumptions.claim: GATING + PREREQUISITES (the dependency line): P0 needs nothing but the authorised EC2 box; P1 needs G-B1 plus concept-LABELLED corpora (current <100-concept kernel suffices — conditioning needs labels, not coverage); P2a needs a P1 win + DDC's arm/control discipline (reading ddc1's verdict for method transfer); P2b needs ENGINE-INF E0 + kernel coverage (SCALE-1 S1/S2) + a blocking pilot; the NS row (comprehensive-kernel-driven routing/drafting/grounding) needs SCALE-1 S2 (1M kernel), RULES-SCALE (engine at scale), the NET-NEW concept->expert alignment map (seeded at P0/P1), and the runtime NL->concept mapper (SCALE-1 §6.6's named open; the l3a parse wall). Current tracks (sense-split, DDC, ENGINE-INF, SCALE-1) are not blocked by and do not wait on GLM52-NS.
assumptions.rationale: Draws the explicit line from today's tracks to the maintainer's north star, so no stage silently presumes an object that does not exist yet.

assumptions.claim: INFRA SPEC: probe on one x86 AVX2 EC2 instance with INSTANCE-LOCAL NVMe (network volumes excluded per colibri's own warning; Graviton excluded by AVX2). Recommended probe box i4i.2xlarge (8 vCPU / 64GiB / 1,875GB Nitro NVMe — 64GB gives ~12% expert-cache headroom for conditioning experiments); cheapest viable floor i4i.xlarge (4 vCPU / 32GiB / 937GB); m6id/c6id.2xlarge rejected (474GB tight; c6id 16GB RAM at colibri's floor). Storage lifecycle: instance-store is ephemeral — convert once, sync the ~370GB int4 artifact to S3 (~$8.5/month), restore per session (~30-60 min parallel); the FP8->int4 converter streams the ~756GB checkpoint shard-by-shard (5GB peak staging) so no oversized download volume is needed. Spot pricing preferred for measurement stages.
assumptions.rationale: Smallest plan that meets colibri's published floor with enough RAM headroom that the admission question is not artificially capped by cache size.

assumptions.claim: COST/PERF PLANNING BANDS, resolution = P0 receipts: instance pricing i4i.xlarge ~$0.34/h, i4i.2xlarge ~$0.69/h on-demand us-east-1 (spot ~60-70% off) — from model knowledge, VERIFY AT SPIN-UP; P0 total ~$20-50 on-demand (~$8-20 spot) + $8.5/mo S3 + 2-4 agent-days; P1 ~$50-150 + 1-2 agent-weeks; P2a ~$100-300 + 2-3 agent-weeks; expected P0 baseline throughput ~0.05-0.1 tok/s cold on ~1GB/s-class NVMe (dev-machine analogue), measured by iobench + the baseline suite. No band is a premise or a commitment.
assumptions.rationale: Prices the staged plan for the maintainer decision without letting any estimate masquerade as a measurement.

assumptions.claim: STAGED PLAN + GATES: P0 (bring-up + fact verification + baseline perf + concept-stratified routing-trace collection + offline replay; measurement only; the one permitted C touch is a ~20-line trace-dump patch, diff kept in-repo) gated by G-B1 (ASM-1976); P1 (live concept-guided PIN A/B vs AUTOPIN vs topic-cluster vs random at matched budget; B2 acceptance side-quest) gated by G-P1: kernel arm beats both deflators live with DRAFT=0 byte-identical outputs — a win licenses at most 'concept-conditioned expert caching reduces expert I/O on concept-labelled workloads at this model/box', sign not slope; P2a (guided expert-drop, matched load-count, prefill/loglik-scored retention) and P2b (A1 host experiments) each require their own prereg + blocking pilot; NS is grant-class and gated per ASM-1983. Every stage stops cleanly; no stage pre-commits the next; within an approved stage ceiling the no-pre-surface rule applies.
assumptions.rationale: Probe->prototype->integration with a kill available at every rung and both directions of every gate worded before any number exists.

assumptions.claim: CLAIM CAPS, fixed now: nothing in GLM52-NS P0-P1 licenses any intelligence, efficiency, parity, cost, or thesis claim — P0/P1 are systems measurements on one model on one box under concept-labelled workloads; a G-P1 kernel-vs-topic tie is reported with equal prominence under the pre-adopted content-not-structure wording (ASM-1977); B1b/A1 results, when they exist, are scoped by their own preregs; no outcome anywhere in this track moves the CORRECTNESS or EFFICIENCY synthesis verdicts, which remain INCONCLUSIVE-PENDING per feasibility-synthesis-v6 until their own designated experiments land.
assumptions.rationale: GLM-5.2 numbers will be quotable; the cap is registered before any exists.

assumptions.claim: EVALUATION-THROUGHPUT MITIGATION: at colibri's 0.05-1 tok/s, generative benchmarks cost days per arm, so all P2a quality/retention endpoints ride PREFILL/LOGLIKELIHOOD scoring (batched prefill amortises expert loads across the whole sequence; the poc/pubeval scoring style), not generation; a small openai_server.py patch exposing echo+logprobs is a named build task. Generative evaluation is reserved for cells where loglik endpoints are undefined, at explicitly budgeted item counts.
assumptions.rationale: Without this the function-changing rungs are unaffordable on the reference substrate; with it they cost 10-100x less by construction of the workload.

assumptions.claim: MAINTAINER DECISION POINTS surfaced by this design: (1) approve/deny P0 + its ~$20-50 ceiling on the already-authorised extra EC2 (after approval, no re-surfacing within the ceiling); (2) fork-vs-upstream-PR etiquette for any glm.c change beyond the P0 trace-dump patch (single-author upstream, no plugin architecture, fork-maintenance liability; upstream-contribution-noise discipline applies); (3) whether B3/Law-1 is ever revisited (default NO per ASM-1981); (4) at P2b time, whether GLM-5.2-as-deterministic-host replaces or supplements API hosts in (A) experiment designs. Each is a threaded GitHub issue per the maintainer-decisions-as-issues practice when it becomes actionable; none is decided in this document.
assumptions.rationale: Separates what the designer proposes from what only the maintainer may decide, and names each decision's trigger point.
